title: 1910 United States census, Leonard F. Zodrow household
repository: National Archives and Records Administration, Record Group 29; accessed through Ancestry
citation: 1910 U.S. census, Sheridan Township, Sheridan County, Kansas, enumeration district 187, sheet 6A, NARA microfilm T624, roll 454, household of Leonard F. Zodrow; Ancestry collection 7884, record 8199853.
transcription: The head was indexed under a garbled surname with Zodrow supplied as an alternate reading. The household includes wife Katie and children Leo, Mary, and Celia A., age 5. The census places Celia as a daughter of Leonard and Katie in Sheridan County.

local_assets.role: census image capture from duplicate pull directory

title: 1885 Kansas state census, John Zodrow household
repository: Kansas State Historical Society; accessed through Ancestry
citation: 1885 Kansas state census, Elk Creek, Republic County, Kansas, 1 March 1885, roll KS1885_114, lines 30 through adjacent-page line 7, household of John Zodrow; Ancestry collection 1088, records 870872 and 870878.
transcription: John Zodrow, 42, and Antone, 38, were enumerated with children including Julius, 14, and Leonard, 10. The image identifies Antone as female despite a faulty index. Older children were Wisconsin-born and younger children Kansas-born; the household was still in Republic County in 1885.

title: 1920 United States census, Leonard F. Zodrow household
repository: National Archives and Records Administration, Record Group 29; accessed through Ancestry
citation: 1920 U.S. census, Sheridan Township, Sheridan County, Kansas, enumeration district 199, sheet 6A and continuation 6B, NARA microfilm T625, roll 551, household 33 of Leonard Zodrow; Ancestry collection 6061, record 73974663.
transcription: Leonard Zodrow, 46, and Katie Zodrow, 46, were enumerated with children Leo, Mary, Cecilia, and an infant son. Cecilia was 15 and identified as their daughter. Katie's reported immigration year conflicts with the 1910 census.

title: 1997 obituary index entry for Cecilia A. Zimmerman
repository: The Salina Journal; indexed by Newspapers.com and accessed through Ancestry
citation: The Salina Journal (Salina, Kansas), 12 December 1997, obituary index entry for Cecilia A. Zimmerman; Ancestry, U.S., Newspapers.com Obituary Index, collection 61843, record 614651166.
transcription: The index gives the deceased subject's birth as 20 June 1904 at Leoville, Kansas, death as 10 December 1997 at Colby, Kansas, and burial at Colby. The full obituary was not accessible. Survivor names are intentionally omitted.

local_assets.role: publisher paywall capture without survivor names

title: 2005 obituary index entry for Doyle J. Zimmerman
repository: The Salina Journal; indexed by Newspapers.com and accessed through Ancestry
citation: The Salina Journal (Salina, Kansas), 12 April 2005, obituary index entry for Doyle J. Zimmerman; Ancestry, U.S., Newspapers.com Obituary Index, record 640990934.
transcription: The index gives the deceased subject's birth as 12 April 1930 at Selden, Kansas, and death as 9 April 2005, with residence and burial at Colby, Kansas. It identifies his deceased spouse. The full obituary was not accessible, and all possibly living relatives are omitted.

title: Search for the Ontario marriage of Thomas and Catherina Nauer
repository: Ontario marriage indexes and Roman Catholic marriage indexes accessed through Ancestry
citation: Negative search on 8 July 2026 in Ancestry collections 7921, 6111, and 8510 for a Thomas Nauer marriage to Catherina circa 1861 in Ontario; no matching entry located.
transcription: No matching marriage appeared in Ontario Marriages, Roman Catholic Marriages, or County Marriage Registers. The search did not identify a parish. Later Nauer-index entries establish only a possible regional lead and are not treated as this couple's family.

title: 1851 Canada census, Lorenz and Thorothea Nauer household
citation: Canada, Census of 1851, Canada West, Waterloo County, Wilmot Township, municipal ward or enumeration district 4, pages 141-144, roll C-11754, Lorenz Nauer household.
transcription: Pages 141-144 form one hewed-log-house household. Lorenz Nauer, 49, and Thorothea Nauer, 50, are Prussia-born Roman Catholics; Lorenz Wand, 18, and Maria Wand, 16, follow, then Carolina Nauer, 14, Jacob Nauer, 10, John Nauer, 8, and Maria Nauer, 5. Thomas Nauer is absent, and the census gives no relationships. Official nationwide and local name-index searches found no Thomas Nauer or plausible spelling variant, but that negative does not prove he was unrelated or rule out omission or residence elsewhere.
